# Figures {.unnumbered}

<!--
  Figures are generated by R scripts in 06_analysis/.
  Run the analysis scripts first to generate PNG files at 300 DPI:
    Rscript 06_analysis/01_pCR_meta_analysis.R
    Rscript 06_analysis/02_PDL1_subgroup_analysis.R
    Rscript 06_analysis/03_EFS_meta_analysis.R
    Rscript 06_analysis/04_OS_meta_analysis.R
    Rscript 06_analysis/05_safety_meta_analysis.R

  Then uncomment the figure includes below.
-->

::: {.callout-note}
Figures are generated by R analysis scripts in `06_analysis/`.
Run the R scripts to produce PNG files before rendering.
:::

<!-- Uncomment when figures are generated:

## Figure 1. Efficacy Outcomes: Forest Plots {.unnumbered}

![Panel A. pCR Forest Plot](../06_analysis/figures/forest_plot_pCR.png){width=100%}

![Panel B. EFS Forest Plot](../06_analysis/figures/forest_plot_EFS.png){width=100%}

![Panel C. OS Forest Plot](../06_analysis/figures/forest_plot_OS.png){width=100%}

\newpage

## Figure 2. PD-L1 Subgroup Analysis {.unnumbered}

![PD-L1 Subgroup Forest Plot](../06_analysis/figures/forest_plot_PDL1_pos.png){width=100%}

\newpage

## Figure 3. Safety and Publication Bias {.unnumbered}

![Panel A. Serious Adverse Events](../06_analysis/figures/forest_plot_safety_irae.png){width=100%}

![Panel B. Funnel Plot](../06_analysis/figures/funnel_plot_pCR.png){width=100%}

-->

{{< include FIGURE_LEGENDS.md >}}
